name: rabbit-spec
summary: Owner of the rabbit workflow's spec-lifecycle skills. Hosts the rabbit-spec-create skill (absorbs the former spec-seeder feature) and the spec-creator subagent that drafts initial spec.md bodies from feature name + optional code globs. Will host rabbit-spec-update (Stage 3) for revising existing specs.
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code exposes native spec-lifecycle skills that supersede this feature
